summary: Tested floor management feature for PDF takeoff app. Found and fixed critical bug: 'numPages is not defined' in handleAddFloor. All 8 requested features verified: Floor add/rename/delete/select, Kerros/Kaikki toggle, grouped summary shows project totals, PDF export shows ALV 0% only, zoom coordinate normalization implemented.

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: numPages is not defined in handleAddFloor function
bugs_fixed.fix: Added const numPages = pdfDocument?.numPages || 0; at start of function

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: LeftSidebar.js - Floor management UI with add/rename/delete buttons, data-testids present
VERIFIED: App.js - floors state, handleAddFloor/Update/Delete/Select functions working
VERIFIED: TakeoffPanel.js - viewMode state (floor/all), displayMeasurements filters correctly
VERIFIED: MeasurementOverlay.js - toNormalizedCoords/toScreenCoords for zoom handling
VERIFIED: export.js - exportPDFWithOptions shows only ALV 0% (lines 200-212)
FIXED: handleAddFloor now properly defines numPages from pdfDocument
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF takeoff app with floor management. Fixed bug in handleAddFloor (numPages undefined). All floor features working: add (+), rename (edit icon), delete (trash icon, except last floor), select (click). Kerros/Kaikki toggle in TakeoffPanel filters measurements. Summary always shows project totals. PDF export shows ALV 0% only. Zoom uses normalized coordinates.

tests_executed.details: Shows toast 'Lisätty: 2. kerros', floor appears in sidebar

tests_executed.test: Floor rename by clicking edit icon
tests_executed.details: Input appears, Enter saves, name updates in sidebar and TakeoffPanel header
Shows toast 'Kerros X poistettu', delete button hidden when 1 floor remains
Selected floor has blue bg (#0052CC), TakeoffPanel header updates
Header shows 'Kaikki: X mittausta' or 'FloorName: X mittausta'
Code verified: only totalCost shown, no VAT calculation (lines 200-212)
MeasurementOverlay uses toNormalizedCoords/toScreenCoords for zoom handling

rca_of_issue.bug: numPages is not defined in handleAddFloor
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Variable numPages was referenced but never declared. Should come from pdfDocument.numPages.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Click add floor button (+) in left sidebar under Kerrokset section
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Added 'const numPages = pdfDocument?.numPages || 0;' at line 472 of App.js
rca_of_issue.verification: Tested add floor - no runtime error, floor added successfully
